WEBPAGE_TITLE: Portfolio, Ivan Manrique | Frontend Dev & Data Analyst
HERO_H1: Code, data and miles: I build solutions that perform.
HERO_H2: Frontend Developer & Data Analyst. I turn data into decisions and ideas into high-impact interfaces, with the same discipline as someone who runs long distances across the desert.
ABOUT_P1: I'm Ivan Daniel Manrique Roa, Frontend Developer and Data Analyst. I build bridges between the data world and user experience, turning complex requirements into digital products that deliver measurable results.
ABOUT_P2: I'm currently pursuing a Software Engineering degree at UTP, where I was selected for the executive talent program Impulsa UTP and rank in the top third of my class. My journey blends two worlds: the analytical precision of data and the art of crafting interfaces that delight.
ABOUT_P3: Away from the screen, I'm a disciplined runner. I'm training for a 35km desert race in Marcona, starting at 3AM, and am on track to earn the "Medal of Inspiration". Every kilometer reinforces the same skills I apply in code: resilience, focus under pressure, time management, and continuous improvement. One sprint at a time, one commit at a time.
EXPERIENCE_SUBTITLE: Proven results with the STAR method
EXP_RIPNEL_1: Built a full corporate ERP from scratch using React, Next.js, and Supabase, delivering a functional platform that centralizes the company's internal operations.
EXP_RIPNEL_2: Implemented automation pipelines with Generative AI for data validation and processing, reducing registration time by 30% and eliminating recurring manual errors.
EXP_RIPNEL_3: Designed and integrated an intelligent multilingual chatbot, decreasing customer response time by 45% and improving internal support satisfaction scores.
EXP_RIPNEL_4: Collaborated directly with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical features, applying agile methodologies with iterative deliveries.
EXP_TP_1: Promoted to Trilingual Tier 4 (Spanish, English, Portuguese), leading support teams and serving as the escalation point for high-complexity cases.
EXP_TP_2: Deployed interactive dashboards with Tableau for operational metric analysis, optimizing KPI visualization and reducing weekly reporting time by 40%.
EXP_TP_3: Led training and mentoring sessions for over 20 agents, increasing First Contact Resolution (FCR) rates by 25% through documentation and process standardization.
EXP_TP_4: Managed customer data with a focus on quality and integrity, applying Data Cleaning techniques and exploratory analysis to identify recurrence patterns and propose preventive solutions.
